howItWorks.title: How Song to Lyric Video Works

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, or FLAC — or paste a link. No account needed to start. The song lyrics to video AI works from your audio, so you do not need to type a single lyric line. Use the full track for YouTube, or pick a section for TikTok and Reels.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs every line
steps.description: Lyrics are transcribed automatically from the audio and synced to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. The AI also reads the mood, energy, and pacing of your song to generate visuals that match the music, not just random backgrounds.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before you publish. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok and Reels, or 1:1 for feed posts — all from one upload. Free, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Turn Songs into Lyric Videos on LyricVideoMaker
whyChoose.description: Most song-to-video tools make you type lyrics, drag them onto a timeline, and manually set every timing point. LyricVideoMaker starts from the audio and does the lyric work for you — so you go from song to finished lyric video in minutes, not hours.

highlight.title: Visuals driven by your song, not by templates
highlight.description: The AI turns each part of your song into a video decision: lyrics become beat-synced animated text, tempo shapes transition pacing, mood guides style and color, and song structure shapes intros, verses, choruses, and breathing room. It feels built from the song, not dropped onto a generic preset.

cards.title: Keep the whole song readable
cards.description: LyricVideoMaker builds space for intros, verses, choruses, bridges, and instrumental breaks, so a full track feels structured instead of becoming one long wall of text.

cards.title: Make YouTube uploads feel finished
cards.description: Add a clean opening moment, readable lyric pacing, and room for channel branding so the video feels ready for a music channel, not just a quick lyric overlay.

cards.title: Turn one track into release assets
cards.description: Use the same song to create a full lyric video, chorus highlight, collaborator preview, or release-week teaser without rebuilding the idea from scratch.

items.question: Can I turn a song into a lyric video without typing the lyrics?
items.answer: No. Upload the song and AI transcribes and syncs every lyric line automatically in 50+ languages — no manual typing. Edit any line if needed.

items.question: What if I already have the lyrics?
items.answer: You can paste or upload your own lyrics file. The AI will still sync them to the audio timing so every line matches the beat.

items.question: How to make a song lyrics video on YouTube?
items.answer: Upload the full song, let AI transcribe and sync the lyrics, preview the 16:9 version, and export a finished lyric video for YouTube. You can leave clean intro or outro space for your channel branding.

items.question: Can I make short clips for TikTok from the same song?
items.answer: Yes. Pick a section — hook, chorus, or any moment — and export in 9:16. The same upload works for full YouTube videos and short TikTok or Reels clips.

items.question: Is this song to lyric video converter free?
items.answer: Yes. Turning your song into a lyric video is free — sign up for free credits and export, no subscription or credit card.

items.question: Can I use the exported video commercially?
items.answer: Yes. The video you make from your song is yours to monetize and release. Just make sure you have the rights to the song you upload.
